title: デビュー戦の後に・伝説級のるんるん

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright takes the race at her own speed.
Despite her slow start, she surges ahead in the
end and achieves a good result.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our strategy pays off this time. However, as her
trainer, I can't help but feel uncertain about the
path ahead if she continues at this leisurely pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest packing her schedule with races so she
can get used to hustling a bit. However, she just
shakes her head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She insists that going at a slow pace suits her
better. Instead, she'll comfortably prepare herself
to win a G1 race as a tribute to the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set a goal to race in the G1 Hopeful Stakes. It
may be an uphill battle getting ready, but I made
up my mind to trust her.
